raw_consumer_statement:
I contacted Citibank about fraudulent charges over XXXX months ago. The matter has not been resolved. 

Citibank is emailing me, sending me letters, texting me and calling me asking for payment for a charge which I did not make. 

Unfortunately, my XXXX XXXX decreased by XXXX points as a result of this matter. 

During the last XXXX and a half months I spoken to people from XXXX different departments of Citibank and the matter has not been resolved.
